schemas.name: FSSAI Registration (Food License)
schemas.description: FSSAI registration and food license online. Basic, state, and central FSSAI license. For food businesses, restaurants, manufacturers, e-commerce food sellers.

step.text: Upload documents and food safety plan
step.name: Step 3

mainEntity.name: Which FSSAI licence do I need?

acceptedAnswer.text: Basic registration: turnover up to ₹12 lakhs. State licence: ₹12 lakhs to ₹20 crore. Central licence: above ₹20 crore, or if operating in 2+ states, or importers/exporters.

mainEntity.name: How long does FSSAI registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Basic: 7 days. State: 30-60 days. Central: 60-90 days. Timelines depend on completeness of documentation and state food authority processing.

Mandatory for any food business operator — manufacturers, processors, distributors, transporters, retailers, importers, storage, and e-commerce food sellers. Turnover-based: Basic Registration (<₹12 lakhs), State Licence (₹12-20 crore), Central Licence (>₹20 crore).

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for FSSAI registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photo ID, address proof, food safety management plan, list of food products, layout plan of premises, NOC from municipality, source of raw material, and water test report. Additional documents for manufacturers: production capacity details.

mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for operating without FSSAI licence?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fine up to ₹5 lakhs under Section 63 of Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006. Imprisonment possible for serious violations. Product recall and business closure orders possible.

mainEntity.name: Is FSSAI needed for cloud kitchen or home-based food business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All food businesses need at minimum FSSAI Basic Registration, including home-based businesses, cloud kitchens, and food delivery through Zomato/Swiggy. Basic Registration costs ₹100 for 1 year.
